start: Point at the floor to activate the path

permissions.title: Location & Camera Permissions
permissions.desc: The following permissions are required to use AR navigation.
permissions.cameraDesc: Used to display guide lines over the real-world space.
permissions.locationDesc: Used to determine your current position and provide accurate guidance.
permissions.safety: Using a smartphone while walking is dangerous. Please stay aware of your surroundings.

success.title: You've Arrived!
success.desc:
You have successfully arrived at {name}.
The {event} event is currently in progress in this area.
